value.found_quote: With the introduction of GPT-5, we added some checks to find and halt hazardous information from being accessed... We classify requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds... Implement safety identifiers for products where individual users interact with a model... we run safety checks on our own models, including all fine-tuned models, and on the computer use tool... Cyber Safety... Fine-tuning safety... Safety checks in computer use
value.rationale: The page directly and comprehensively substantiates every element of the claim: (1) It confirms safety classifiers exist for GPT-5 and forward, (2) it describes classifying requests into risk thresholds and halting hazardous information, (3) it documents per-user safety identifiers via the `safety_identifier` parameter, (4) it references cybersecurity monitoring ("Cyber Safety"), and (5) it explicitly states safety checks are run across computer use and fine-tuning. The page presents this as a currently active, generally available system with no preview/beta caveats.
